name: Kropki (Dots)
author: Abstract Games factory
description: The traditional Russian/Polish paper-and-pencil game of Dots (Точки/Kropki). Place dots on grid intersections and capture the opponent's dots by enclosing them in an unbroken chain of your own (diagonals connect). Captured areas are painted and dead; encircling a captured area back frees your dots. Most captures wins.
